context.projectOverview: agent-bober chat session layer. Sprint 2 adds non-blocking DETACHED spawn: a chat turn classified as 'spawn' launches a runPipeline worker that survives REPL exit, using a session-generated runId via a new --run-id flag on the run command.

completedSprints.title: Chat REPL that answers
completedSprints.summary: Added src/chat/ module (ChatSession, TurnClassifier with jsonObjectMode, ConversationStore JSONL resume, RosterReader over readRunStatesFromDisk, answerer, slash-commands), a 'chat' PROMPT role in config (schema/defaults/role-providers), and the 'bober chat' CLI command. No SDK imports in src/chat.
